title: cynanchum balfourianum
intro: Cynanchum balfourianum, also known as the Balfour's Cynanchum, is a species of flowering plant in the dogbane family, Apocynaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum balfourianum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, it is often used in infusions, tinctures, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
